findings.title: Dynamic code execution via re.compile()
findings.description: Code uses re.compile() to execute dynamically constructed code
findings.remediation: Use ast.literal_eval() for safe evaluation. Avoid re.compile() with untrusted input.

findings.title: Unexpected capability for search skill: shell
findings.description: A 'search' skill would not normally require 'shell' capability. Allowed capabilities for this category: network_outbound
findings.remediation: Review why a search skill needs shell access.
